title: HTML lex DFA extraction bug: state 76 doesn't stop at '<'
description: FIXED in 8ffe44c on feat/st1-lex-fix. Root cause: parseIfTransitions in lex_extract.go matched 'lookahead \!= 0' first in compound conditions like 'lookahead \!= chr && lookahead \!= 0', returning a catch-all default that discarded other exclusions. Fix adds CharExclusions to LexTransition, detects &&-chained \!= patterns, and emits compound negation checks in codegen. HTML grammar regenerated. 3/4 HTML tests pass (void element timeout is a separate external scanner issue).
